AssociateAssessmentReportEvidenceFolder.description: Grants permission to associate an evidence folder with an assessment report in AWS Audit Manager

BatchAssociateAssessmentReportEvidence.description: Grants permission to associate a list of evidence to an assessment report in AWS Audit Manager

BatchCreateDelegationByAssessment.description: Grants permission to create delegations for an assessment in AWS Audit Manager

BatchDeleteDelegationByAssessment.description: Grants permission to delete delegations for an assessment in AWS Audit Manager

BatchDisassociateAssessmentReportEvidenc.description: Grants permission to disassociate a list of evidence from an assessment report in AWS Audit Manager

BatchImportEvidenceToAssessmentControl.description: Grants permission to import a list of evidence to an assessment control in AWS Audit Manager

CreateAssessment.description: Grants permission to create an assessment to be used with AWS Audit Manager

CreateAssessmentFramework.description: Grants permission to create a framework for use in AWS Audit Manager

CreateAssessmentReport.description: Grants permission to create an assessment report in AWS Audit Manager

CreateControl.description: Grants permission to create a control to be used in AWS Audit Manager

DeleteAssessment.description: Grants permission to delete an assessment in AWS Audit Manager

DeleteAssessmentFramework.description: Grants permission to delete an assessment framework in AWS Audit Manager

DeleteAssessmentFrameworkShare.description: Grants permission to delete a share request for a custom framework in AWS Audit Manager

DeleteAssessmentReport.description: Grants permission to delete an assessment report in AWS Audit Manager

DeleteControl.description: Grants permission to delete a control in AWS Audit Manager

DeregisterAccount.description: Grants permission to deregister an account in AWS Audit Manager

DeregisterOrganizationAdminAccount.description: Grants permission to deregister the delegated administrator account for AWS Audit Manager

DisassociateAssessmentReportEvidenceFold.description: Grants permission to disassociate an evidence folder from an assessment report in AWS Audit Manager

GetAccountStatus.description: Grants permission to get the status of an account in AWS Audit Manager

GetAssessment.description: Grants permission to get an assessment created in AWS Audit Manager

GetAssessmentFramework.description: Grants permission to get an assessment framework in AWS Audit Manager

GetAssessmentReportUrl.description: Grants permission to get the URL for an assessment report in AWS Audit Manager

GetChangeLogs.description: Grants permission to get changelogs for an assessment in AWS Audit Manager

GetControl.description: Grants permission to get a control in AWS Audit Manager

GetDelegations.description: Grants permission to get all delegations in AWS Audit Manager

GetEvidence.description: Grants permission to get evidence from AWS Audit Manager

GetEvidenceByEvidenceFolder.description: Grants permission to get all the evidence from an evidence folder in AWS Audit Manager

GetEvidenceFileUploadUrl.description: Grants permission to get a presigned Amazon S3 URL that can be used to upload a file as manual evidence

GetEvidenceFolder.description: Grants permission to get the evidence folder from AWS Audit Manager

GetEvidenceFoldersByAssessment.description: Grants permission to get the evidence folders from an assessment in AWS Audit Manager

GetEvidenceFoldersByAssessmentControl.description: Grants permission to get the evidence folders from an assessment control in AWS Audit Manager

GetInsights.description: Grants permission to get analytics data for all active assessments

GetInsightsByAssessment.description: Grants permission to get analytics data for a specific active assessment

GetOrganizationAdminAccount.description: Grants permission to get the delegated administrator account in AWS Audit Manager

GetServicesInScope.description: Grants permission to get the services in scope for an assessment in AWS Audit Manager

GetSettings.description: Grants permission to get all settings configured in AWS Audit Manager

ListAssessmentControlInsightsByControlDo.description: Grants permission to list analytics data for controls in a specific control domain and active assessment

ListAssessmentFrameworkShareRequests.description: Grants permission to list all sent or received share requests for custom frameworks in AWS Audit Manager

ListAssessmentFrameworks.description: Grants permission to list all assessment frameworks in AWS Audit Manager

ListAssessmentReports.description: Grants permission to list all assessment reports in AWS Audit Manager

ListAssessments.description: Grants permission to list all assessments in AWS Audit Manager

ListControlDomainInsights.description: Grants permission to list analytics data for control domains across all active assessments

ListControlDomainInsightsByAssessment.description: Grants permission to list analytics data for control domains in a specific active assessment

ListControlInsightsByControlDomain.description: Grants permission to list analytics data for controls in a specific control domain across all active assessments

ListControls.description: Grants permission to list all controls in AWS Audit Manager

ListKeywordsForDataSource.description: Grants permission to list all the data source keywords in AWS Audit Manager

ListNotifications.description: Grants permission to list all notifications in AWS Audit Manager

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for an AWS Audit Manager resource

RegisterAccount.description: Grants permission to register an account in AWS Audit Manager

RegisterOrganizationAdminAccount.description: Grants permission to register an account within the organization as the delegated administrator for AWS Audit Manager

StartAssessmentFrameworkShare.description: Grants permission to create a share request for a custom framework in AWS Audit Manager

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag an AWS Audit Manager resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag an AWS Audit Manager resource

UpdateAssessment.description: Grants permission to update an assessment in AWS Audit Manager

UpdateAssessmentControl.description: Grants permission to update an assessment control in AWS Audit Manager

UpdateAssessmentControlSetStatus.description: Grants permission to update the status of an assessment control set in AWS Audit Manager

UpdateAssessmentFramework.description: Grants permission to update an assessment framework in AWS Audit Manager

UpdateAssessmentFrameworkShare.description: Grants permission to update a share request for a custom framework in AWS Audit Manager

UpdateAssessmentStatus.description: Grants permission to update the status of an assessment in AWS Audit Manager

UpdateControl.description: Grants permission to update a control in AWS Audit Manager

UpdateSettings.description: Grants permission to update settings in AWS Audit Manager

ValidateAssessmentReportIntegrity.description: Grants permission to validate the integrity of an assessment report in AWS Audit Manager

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
